mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over a 3-year rolling window or forward returns are negative in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.5%, labor market slack signals deteriorating consumer spending power, which forces equity price corrections over the following 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered instances or the signal loses statistical significance (p > 0.05) in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer and business demand expansion, driving positive S&P 500 returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in >50% of cases or the interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in a multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect strengthening manufacturing output and supply chain efficiency, which triggers short-term equity momentum over the next week.
failure_condition: The signal fails to predict positive 5-day returns during early-cycle phases or exhibits a negative rank correlation over rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained inflation readings above 215 force central banks to maintain restrictive policy, compressing equity multiples and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over one month.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in >65% of high-inflation observations or the inflation threshold shows no predictive power in a logistic regression model.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent job growth and sub-6% unemployment confirm a resilient labor market that supports corporate earnings growth, yielding positive equity returns over a three-month horizon.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal produces negative forward returns in >55% of cases or the interaction effect vanishes when controlling for monetary policy shocks.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth directly increases corporate revenue expectations, creating immediate positive price pressure on the S&P 500 over the following five trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.01 over rolling 2-year windows or 5-day forward returns show no statistical relationship with GDP growth rates.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 110 indicates supply-side bottlenecks and weakening manufacturing activity, which suppresses equity valuations over the next month during contraction phases.
failure_condition: The signal generates positive forward returns in >60% of triggered instances or loses predictive accuracy when tested against quarterly earnings revisions.
